list.my – Taman Sri Nibong Property Prices: https://list.my/subsales/penang/barat-daya/12/taman-sri-nibong
notes: Valuation is based on live asking prices plus recent transaction/market-median evidence in Taman Sri Nibong / Sungai Nibong. The strongest anchors were Taman Sri Nibong condo subsales around 1,055–1,098 sqft at roughly RM441–RM540 psf (about RM465k–RM575k), EdgeProp’s Novus sold median at RM637 psf, and current Novus/Melati asking prices. Because the exact block/project is not specified, I treated this as a broad area valuation rather than a premium-Novus-only estimate. I excluded rentals and room-only ads.
